scripts.minify:css: cleancss -o assets/css/main.min.css assets/css/main.css && cleancss -o assets/css/checkout.min.css assets/css/checkout.css && cleancss -o assets/css/reservation.min.css assets/css/reservation.css && cleancss -o assets/css/admin.min.css assets/css/admin.css
scripts.minify:js: terser assets/js/main.js -c -m -o assets/js/main.min.js && terser assets/js/checkout.js -c -m -o assets/js/checkout.min.js && terser assets/js/reservation.js -c -m -o assets/js/reservation.min.js && terser assets/js/admin.js -c -m -o assets/js/admin.min.js
scripts.build:assets: npm run minify:css && npm run minify:js
